name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: ["main"]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      action:
        description: '작업 선택 (deploy 또는 destroy)'
        required: true
        default: 'deploy'
        type: choice
        options:
          - deploy
          - destroy

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Docker 빌드 & 푸시
        if: github.event_name == 'push' || github.event.inputs.action == 'deploy'
        run: |
          docker build -t ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}/my-web-app:latest .
          echo "${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN }}" | docker login -u "${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}" --password-stdin
          docker push ${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}/my-web-app:latest

      - name: Ansible 배포/삭제
        env:
          # Ansible이 실행될 때 사용할 환경 변수 설정 (접속 계정 키 경로 등)
          ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING: 'False'
        run: |
          # 작업 분기 처리
          if [ "${{ github.event.inputs.action }}" == "destroy" ]; then
            ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.ini ansible/destroy.yml \
              -e "docker_username=${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}"
          else
            ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.ini ansible/deploy.yml \
              -e "docker_username=${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}" \
              -e "docker_password=${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_TOKEN }}"
          fi
